patches.summary: Deduplicate sort_by in tiktok and user_id in instagram across CREATE TABLE, backfillColumns, INSERT/ON CONFLICT, lookupFieldValue, and schema-version test asserts.
patches.reason: The store generator aggregates per-endpoint parameters into one typed table per platform but does not dedupe column names. Multiple tiktok endpoints declare sort_by and multiple instagram endpoints declare user_id, so the emitted CREATE TABLE failed with 'duplicate column name' on first sync init, blocking every sync-dependent command.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/store/ now passes (52 tests, including all TestMigrate_AddsColumnsOnUpgrade_* cases).
